calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff'S Individual Claims With Prejudice And Dismiss Class Allegations Without Prejudice Pursuant To Cal. Rule Of Court Rule 3.770
Off Calendar Apr-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOANA FANG, Esq. of Blackstone Law, APC (Tel: 310-622-4278) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CHERYL CHARLTON's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Individual Claims With Prejudice And Dismiss Class Allegations Without Prejudice Pursuant To Cal. Rule Of Court Rule 3.770.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to dismiss plaintiff's individual claims with prejudice and dismiss class allegations without prejudice pursuant to Cal. Rule of Court Rule 3.770" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
